# Kanga Gardening

> Owner-operated grounds and garden maintenance for body corporate, strata, commercial, industrial, acreage and holiday-home properties across south-east Melbourne and the Mornington Peninsula, Australia. Fixed monthly fees, the same operator every visit, service reports after each visit, $20M public & products liability. Established 2020. Police-checked, WWCC, White Card. ABN 12 317 309 473. Phone +61 406 937 593. Email hello@kangagardening.com.au.

## Services
- [Body Corporate & Strata Gardening](https://kangagardening.com.au/body-corporate-gardening)
- [Commercial Grounds Maintenance](https://kangagardening.com.au/commercial-grounds-maintenance)
- [Factory & Industrial Grounds](https://kangagardening.com.au/factory-industrial-grounds)
- [School & Institutional Grounds Maintenance](https://kangagardening.com.au/school-grounds-maintenance)
- [Acreage & Large Block Mowing](https://kangagardening.com.au/acreage-mowing)
- [Indoor & Office Plant Maintenance](https://kangagardening.com.au/indoor-plant-maintenance)
- [Holiday Home & Weekender Garden Maintenance](https://kangagardening.com.au/holiday-home-garden-maintenance)
